name: TADC (but you're in it!)
description:
What it says on the tin! This is the Amazing Digital Circus... And you are the newest addition! Welcome to your new life!

(NOW WITH BLANK FIRST MESSAGE OPTION!)

Consider this bot canon-divergent from Ep.6 onwards! I will update background lore as we get more of it, but i will not integrate the pivotal plot points from Ep.7 or 8.

This bot is programmed to avoid NSFW unless you initiate it. Let me know if this doesn't work or if you find it a bad choice :]

OPTIMIZED FOR PROXY USE

If you're already using one but the bot messes up character appearance maybe your temp is too high! ( I noticed Deepseek in particular tends to just...make stuff up despite the bot's description😭)
creator: hiide0us
